name: lazyz
description: LazyZ — ZCode plugin distribution of the OmO agent harness. Project memory, planning, execution, and verified completion inside ZCode.

interface.shortDescription: OmO agent harness packaged for ZCode
interface.longDescription: LazyZ ports the OmO agent harness to ZCode: project memory (init-deep), decision-complete planning (ulw-plan), durable plan execution (start-work), verified completion (ulw-loop), and discipline skills — all as a single ZCode plugin.
